## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Canonical document owner is identified before editing.
- [ ] No redundant source of truth is introduced.
- [ ] Agent instructions are updated if future Codex behavior should change.
- [ ] Markdown links and stale references are checked.
- [ ] The seven-doc structure is preserved unless explicitly approved.
